rlmesh.title: rlmesh
rlmesh.description: Root imports for the dependency-free Python SDK.

rlmesh.model.title: rlmesh.model
rlmesh.model.description: Shared model wrapper base classes and callback types.

rlmesh.client.title: rlmesh.client
rlmesh.client.description: Shared remote environment client base classes and endpoint helpers.
rlmesh.client.status: Stable base behavior; prefer backend-specific public clients for user code.

rlmesh.numpy.title: rlmesh.numpy
rlmesh.numpy.description: NumPy-backed clients, models, sandbox sessions, and tensor helpers.
rlmesh.numpy.status: Stable and recommended for alpha Python examples.

rlmesh.torch.title: rlmesh.torch
rlmesh.torch.description: Torch-backed clients, models, sandbox sessions, and tensor helpers.

rlmesh.sandbox.title: rlmesh.sandbox
rlmesh.sandbox.description: Experimental Docker-backed sandbox session base classes.

rlmesh.spaces.title: rlmesh.spaces
rlmesh.spaces.description: Named RLMesh-native space wrappers and Gymnasium adapters.
rlmesh.spaces.status: Stable core spaces; extra wrappers are experimental.

rlmesh.types.title: rlmesh.types
rlmesh.types.description: Structural protocols and shared value aliases.

rlmesh.specs.title: rlmesh.specs
rlmesh.specs.description: Native environment and space spec classes.

rlmesh.EnvServer.description: Serves a Python environment through the RLMesh runtime protocol.

rlmesh.Tensor.description: Native tensor value used by RLMesh value encoding.

rlmesh.spaces.description: Space wrappers and Gymnasium conversion helpers.

rlmesh.model.LifecycleCallback.description: No-argument callback used for model lifecycle events.

rlmesh.model.PredictFn.description: Callable that maps one observation to one action.

rlmesh.client.Transport.description: Endpoint transport selector: TCP or Unix sockets.

rlmesh.numpy.NumpyValue.description: Primitive, NumPy array, or nested RLMesh-compatible value.

rlmesh.numpy.SandboxEnv.description: NumPy-backed owned sandbox session for one environment.

rlmesh.numpy.SandboxVectorEnv.description: NumPy-backed owned sandbox session for vector environments.

rlmesh.torch.TorchValue.description: Primitive, Torch tensor, or nested RLMesh-compatible value.

rlmesh.spaces.SpaceSpec.description: Native space specification used by RLMesh spaces.

rlmesh.spaces.from_gymnasium_space.description: Convert a Gymnasium space into an RLMesh space wrapper.

rlmesh.spaces.space_from_spec.description: Create the named RLMesh space wrapper for a native SpaceSpec.

rlmesh.spaces.to_gymnasium_space.description: Convert an RLMesh space or spec into a Gymnasium space.

rlmesh.types.InfoDict.description: Environment info dictionary returned by reset and step calls.

rlmesh.types.Metadata.description: Read-only metadata mapping exposed by remote environment clients.

rlmesh.types.PrimitiveValue.description: Primitive value type supported by RLMesh value encoding.

rlmesh.types.Value.description: Recursive value type supported by RLMesh value encoding.

rlmesh.specs.EnvContract.description: Native environment contract returned by remote handshakes.

descriptions.ServeOptions: Server lifecycle options controlling remote shutdown and timeout behavior.
descriptions.Tensor: Native tensor value carrying a buffer, shape, dtype, and derived layout metadata.
descriptions.EnvContract: Environment metadata returned during a remote client handshake.
descriptions.SpaceSpec: Native space specification used by RLMesh spaces and protocol contracts.
